'''"Eyes"''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who had once been imprisoned on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. However, when a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] came to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], "Eyes" stowed away on board the smuggler's [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], paying the crew 50 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per day to keep him safe.
